Tours

Tours to Herat

Apr-Jun

Afghanistan Discovery Tour Spring

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

From $1,890 9 days
Sep-Nov

Afghanistan Discovery Tour Fall

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

From $1,950 9 days
Year-round

Custom Expedition

The Custom Expedition allows travelers to design a personalized itinerary anywhere in Afghanistan.

From $3,500 15 days
Year-round

Photography Tour

The Photography Tour is designed for travelers who want to capture Afghanistan’s landscapes, architecture, and people.

From $2,850 12 days
Year-round

Scientific Expeditions

Scientific Expeditions are designed for researchers, academics, and documentary teams seeking logistical support.

From $4,500 14 days
Year-round

Treasures of the Silk Road

A deep dive into the historical heart of Afghanistan, crossing the Hindu Kush.

From $2,450 10 days
Year-round

The Timurid Grandeur of Herat

A focused exploration of Herat, often called the "Pearl of Khorasan".

From $1,850 7 days
Apr–Oct

The Timurid Grandeur of Herat — Additional Minaret-e-Jam

A deep-country expedition starting in Kabul, flying to Herat and taking a 4x4 journey to the Minaret of Jam.

From $2,250 10 days
AfghanTours

Discover the breathtaking landscapes, ancient history, and rich culture of Afghanistan with our expert-guided tours.
